errors.unexpected: Something went wrong in the local panel. Please retry the action.
errors.llmApiKeyMissing: LLM API key is missing. Add llm.apiKey in the config or set OPENAI_API_KEY, then restart the panel.
errors.llmAuthFailed: LLM authentication failed. Check llm.apiKey, OPENAI_API_KEY, and the provider baseURL.
errors.llmRequestAborted: The LLM request timed out or was aborted after retries. Check the provider/network, or increase llm.timeout and retry.
errors.llmRateLimited: The LLM provider rate limit was reached. Wait a moment, lower concurrency, or retry a smaller selection.
errors.llmProviderUnavailable: The LLM provider is temporarily unavailable. Retry later or check the configured baseURL.
errors.panelApiOutOfSync: The panel frontend and local API are out of sync. Restart the panel process and refresh this page.
errors.panelConnectionLost: The local panel API connection was lost. Restart the panel process and retry.
overview.title: Translation workspace
overview.pendingReviewSummary: {count} target file tasks need translation review
overview.showingPending: Showing {visible} of {total} pending target file tasks.
overview.openFailedTitle: The translation workspace could not be opened.
editor.noFileMatches: No JSON files match this search.
editor.noMatchingKeysBody: No key path or copy in {path} matches the current search and filters.
editor.selectValidJsonBody: The table will align every string leaf across configured languages.
editor.translateDescription: {ready} target cells will be translated into the current browser draft.
editor.masterTranslateDescription: One-time translation from another master into the current master draft.
editor.saveBeforeLeave: Save before leaving the table editor?
editor.draftsCannotFollow: They cannot follow you into another JSON file.
editor.draftsStayBrowser: They stay in this browser draft until you save or discard them.
editor.clearFilters: Clear the filters or choose another locale file.
editor.fileChangedReview: The current file changed on disk. Save will check revisions before writing.
editor.fileChangedResolve: The file changed on disk. Resolve the overlapping cells before saving again.
editor.externalPreserved: External changes were preserved and your draft was rebased. Review and save again.
editor.reloadFailed: Could not reload the changed file: {message}
editor.saveFailed: Save failed. No unchecked overwrite was attempted.
editor.conflictsResolved: Conflicts resolved in the draft. Review the table and save again.
editor.masterOnlyMulti: Master-to-master translation is only available in multi-master mode.
editor.chooseOtherMaster: Choose another master language as the source.
editor.aiDraftsGenerated: Generated {count} AI drafts. Review and save explicitly.
editor.noTranslatableCells: No translatable target cells in this selection.
editor.noMasterCells: No master cells can be translated with the current options.
editor.cancelled: Translation job cancelled. Completed AI drafts were kept.
editor.reasonKeyMissing: Key is not in the current file
editor.reasonMasterCell: Master language cells cannot be translated
editor.reasonTargetNotString: Target cell is not a string value
editor.reasonLocalDraft: Cell already has a local draft
editor.reasonSourceMissing: Source cell is missing or not a string value
editor.reasonReviewed: Already reviewed; use Force retranslate to refresh
editor.reasonChooseTwoMasters: Choose two different master languages in multi-master mode
editor.reasonTargetMasterNotString: Target master cell is not a string value
editor.reasonSourceMasterMissing: Source master cell is missing or not a string value
editor.reasonExistingMaster: Existing master copy; enable overwrite to replace
details.title: Details and safety
details.filesMatchDraft: Local files match the current editor draft.
details.noJob: No AI translation job has run in this file session.
details.writeBoundary: AI translations become drafts first; only Save writes files, snapshots, and accepted cache entries.
search.title: Search workspace
search.description: Find copy across every configured locale file, then jump straight to the table cell.
search.typeCopy: Type copy, or choose a state filter.
search.emptyHint: Search by visible copy first. Add key path matching only when you need structural lookup.
search.noResults: No matching copy found in configured locale files.
conflict.title: Resolve overlapping cells
conflict.description: Unrelated disk changes are already preserved. Choose a value for each cell changed in both places.
conflict.keyGone: The key no longer exists in any language.
shortcuts.title: CLI shortcut
shortcuts.masterDescription: {source} will be translated into {target}. This writes the target master files directly.
shortcuts.scopeDescription: {scope} will be processed across the project using CLI semantics.
shortcuts.forceWarning: Force refresh clears the translation cache before running and may rewrite reviewed target copy.
shortcuts.masterWarning: This is a one-time helper. It does not change route ownership and writes the target master files directly.
shortcuts.pendingWarning: This writes local target files, cache, and snapshot directly. It does not create browser drafts.
shortcuts.copyFailed: Unable to copy command to clipboard
shortcuts.noRun: No shortcut has run in this panel session yet.
shortcuts.queueNote: The run is using the same project queue as scan and save.
shortcuts.safetyCli: Runs use the same core logic as the CLI.
shortcuts.safetyWrites: Results write local JSON files, cache, and snapshot directly.
shortcuts.safetyEditable: Confirm before running; this page does not create table-editor drafts.
shortcuts.overwriteMaster: Overwrite existing master copy · ignore cache
shortcuts.readyStatus: Ready to copy or run a CLI shortcut
settings.title: Settings
settings.restartWaiting: Saved config is waiting for panel restart
settings.loadedSession: Config loaded in this panel session
settings.restartToast: Restart the panel for route, path, prompt, or watcher changes to apply.
settings.panelLanguageHelp: Stored in this browser only. It does not change i18n-translate.config.mjs.
settings.promptPlaceholder: Brand terms, tone, formatting, domain vocabulary…
settings.runtimeNote: Resolved from current config · not rewritten by Settings
settings.confirmDescription: This updates i18n-translate.config.mjs only. Locale JSON files, cache, and snapshots are not changed by this save.
settings.confirmNote: Settings will patch managed defineConfig fields in place. Custom imports, helper functions, comments outside changed managed properties, and the llm block are preserved.
